summary: Full backend + frontend testing of Axes Solutions diploma app. 17/17 backend pytest tests pass. Frontend: home loads, theme & lang switch persist (ax.theme/ax.lang), all nav pages 200, request form submits & shows success banner, login error on bad creds, login success redirects to /admin.html and stores ax.token, admin tabs present, logout clears token. No critical issues found.
critical_code_review_comments: JWT_SECRET has hardcoded fallback in server.py (line 25) — acceptable for diploma but ideally only read from env in production
No rate limiting on /api/reviews and /api/requests public POST endpoints — could be spammed; consider basic IP throttling
ADMIN_EMAIL / ADMIN_PASSWORD hardcoded in server.py (lines 28-29) — fine for diploma demo but should come from env in production
Reviews/Requests responses don't paginate; OK for demo scale
test_credentials: Admin: admin@axessolution.com / Admin@123 (auto-seeded). /app/memory/test_credentials.md was empty — credentials were taken from review_request.
seed_data_creation: Backend seeds 3 approved reviews automatically on startup (Aigerim K., Daniyar B., Marina S.) — verified visible on /reviews.html.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest file at /app/backend/tests/test_axes_api.py covers health, auth (success+401+me), requests CRUD (create public, invalid service 400, invalid email 422, list 401/200, status update, delete with 404 verification), reviews (public approved-only, pending creation, admin list-all, approve, delete, admin auth required). Use REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env. Frontend is plain static HTML on port 3000 — no React. Tested data-testid selectors: hero-cta-primary, theme-toggle, lang-select, request-{company,email,service,message,submit}, login-{email,password,submit}, tab-requests, tab-reviews — all present and working.
